sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8406" key="a)nepi/monos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνεπί-μονος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8406.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not enduring long,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.7b</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:40:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">40.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
